title: Fermented Crispy Norwegian Cod Pancake with Creme Fraiche and Honey
description: This hangover-cure dish combines fermented elements with a crispy exterior, perfect for a light breakfast or snack.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Mix together fermented cod, creme fraiche, honey, baking powder, and salt until well combined.
Divide the mixture into several small portions and shape them into pancakes using your hands or a pancake mould.
Cook each pancake on one side for about 2 minutes, then flip to cook the other side. Remove from heat when golden brown.
Serve hot with additional honey drizzled over.
